title: Duplicating Table
description: This mod lets you duplicate anything you want by using a duplicating table.
body:
Ever needed a way to get a lot of diamonds quickly? Or maybe you're tired of endless hours of farming, mining and grinding. Well, no more! With this amazing mod, you can duplicate any item in Minecraft.

To craft a duplicating table, you need:
- 1 Crafting Table
- 4 Iron Ingots
- 4 Redstone Dust

![Put the crafting table in the center, iron ingots in the edges, and redstone dust in the corners.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/faeedf6c085426b45feccbd4014021e0be2e3aee.png)

How a Duplicating Table looks in the game:

![They look similar to a crafting table but they are white.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29d37d6d6db372db45364c49adcf8fa8baede32a.png)

To break the Duplicating Table, you need to use a pickaxe. Duplicating an item is simple: just put the item or block in the first slot and press the Duplicate button to get 2 of the same item or block in the output slot.

Duplicating an item (diamond):

![Even diamonds can be duplicated.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abf77034435f08e6d5d16fd563a7476fe1422520.gif)

Enchanted items can also be duplicated, and they retain their enchantments after duplication:

![You can duplicate an item like an enchanted iron sword.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8945dfa5148f309fef18312bed02bd8d381fa11.gif)

This mod also supports the duplication of modded items and blocks.

Check out my other mods [here](https://modrinth.com/user/Sumbaii999).
